concerns.text: Task T051 is marked as a required deliverable to update quickstart.md but is currently unchecked (incomplete). This leaves the project's reproducibility documentation incomplete and the pipeline unverified end-to-end, violating the requirement that all tasks be executable.

Spec FR-002 mandates 'Mixed-Effects Regression' and FR-009 mandates 'leave-one-region-out'. While the Plan and Tasks (T023, T035) correctly implement 'Fixed-Effects' and 'leave-one-country-out' for statistical validity (N=3), there is NO task to amend the Spec text itself to reflect this deviation. The Spec remains formally contradictory to the implementation plan.

Spec FR-005 requires sampling ONLY if raw data exceeds memory limits. Task T018 includes logic to apply sampling if 'raw data < 7GB but N < 5000', which contradicts the Spec's trigger condition and risks unnecessary data loss. A task to resolve this logic conflict or amend the Spec is missing.

Spec FR-003 requires a 'weighted composite score' but does not fix weights. Tasks T007b and T022 mandate a strict 'equal weighting (0.2 each)' strategy. There is no task to either amend FR-003 to allow fixed weights or to implement a dynamic weight optimization strategy as implied by the Spec's intent.

Success Criterion SC-002 requires measuring convergence time against the GitHub Actions free-tier limit. Task T028 only tests 'timeout handling' and 'retry logic'. There is no task to explicitly measure and report the actual convergence time to verify SC-002 is met.
